title: Elaina, the Apprentice Witch
overview: Elaina works hard to pass the magic exams so she can become a witch and travel the world, like the witch from her favorite book. But before she can become a full-fledged witch, she needs to find a witch who will take her on as an apprentice.

title: The Land of Mages
overview: Elaina arrives at the Land of Mages hoping to be treated well because of her status as a witch, but her time in the country takes a new direction after she meets the novice, Saya.

title: The Girl as Pretty as a Flower / Bottled Happiness
overview: On the outskirts of one country, Elaina encounters a beautiful flower field with a dark secret. In a different country, she meets a boy gathering happiness in a bottle.

title: The Princess Without Subjects
overview: Elaina enters a country in ruins with no choice but to look for a place to spend the night. The only building left standing is a castle with a princess living alone inside...

title: Royal Celesteria
overview: Elaina visits Royal Celestria, where mages perform in the streets and do odd jobs. She finds a place called the Royal Magic Academy, but she isn't allowed to go in...

title: The Land of Truth Tellers
overview: Elaina visits the Land of Truth Tellers and finds its citizens strangely quiet and not at all like the honest people she expected to see.

title: The Wall Etched by Travelers / The Grape-Stomping Girl
overview: Elaina visits a country from The Adventures of Niké after Saya was sent there for a job, and then she has her first taste of alcohol in a village famous for its wine.

title: The Ripper
overview: Elaina arrives in a town full of dolls and overhears a witch named Sheila investigating a series of attacks by a criminal known as the Ripper.

title: A Deep Sorrow from the Past
overview: In the Clock Village of Rostolf, Elaina, finding herself short on money, takes on a job to help another witch change a tragic past.

title: The Two Teachers
overview: Fran and Sheila look back at how their first adventure and how their relationship has changed since they first met.

title: The Two Apprentices
overview: Elaina's path crosses Saya's again when she visits another country from The Adventures of Niké and Saya is there on a job for the United Magic Association.

title: The Everyday Tale of Every Ashen Witch
overview: Elaina enters a mysterious country that claims to grant wishes and encounters many different versions of herself.
